name: @acastos/fact-query
description: Node.js/TypeScript bindings for fact-query: parse, form-check, and bounded read-only conjunctive-query evaluation with provenance, in WebAssembly.
author: Nathan Moos <moosingin3space@gmail.com>

scripts.build:wasm: cargo build --target wasm32-unknown-unknown --release && wasm-bindgen --target nodejs --out-dir wasm target/wasm32-unknown-unknown/release/fact_query_node.wasm
scripts.build: npm run build:wasm && npm run build:ts
